stemHtml: Which of the following statements is true regarding hydraulic actuators?

options.a: Powered by a hydraulic system and not connected to an electrical system.
options.b: ​Powered by an electric system not connected to the hydraulic system.
options.c: The electrical actuator uses hydraulic fluid to move independently from the hydraulic system.
options.d: Connected to the hydraulic system with electrical sensors to improve accuracy.
